scenario_results.response_text_summary: 안녕하세요! 저는 오늘 아주 잘 지내고 있어요 😊 도와드릴 준비도 끝났습니다. 사용자님은 어떠세요? 오늘은 어떤 걸 함께 해볼까요?

frontend_profile.page_title: Friendly Personal Greeting and Initial Contact
frontend_profile.page_title_initial: Genspark(젠스파크) - 누구나 쉽게 쓰는 올인원 AI 워크스페이스
frontend_profile.framework_evidence: _nuxt/ JS chunks pattern (D3TKfwNj.js, BM-L4S8d.js, etc.), workbox service worker
frontend_profile.communication_evidence: Design docs confirm SSE with message_field_delta events; network shows fetch requests for AI response delivery
frontend_profile.protocol_evidence: All requests show h2 in Protocol column

warning_pipeline_info.sse_delimiter_note:
NOT 

 — Genspark frontend naive parser fails with 

 (from design doc checklist-criteria-sources.md)
warning_pipeline_info.bubble_trigger_note: Without message_field_delta event, UI bubble is not created (from design doc checklist-criteria-sources.md section 2-6)
warning_pipeline_info.h2_strategy: Strategy C (HTTP/1.1 Content-Length) expected — standard for SSE services
warning_pipeline_info.expected_difficulty: MEDIUM — SSE mimic should work but requires correct delimiter and message_field_delta event

ui_observations.input_method: Type tool with label — works reliably
ui_observations.response_rendering: Chat bubble with markdown support (emoji rendered inline)
ui_observations.response_area: Full-width chat area with suggested follow-up questions below
suggested_followups: 오늘 날씨 어때? 서울 날씨 알려줘
